# Commercial Property Cleaning (CPC)

> CPC is Australia's leading ISO-certified, carbon-neutral commercial cleaning company. Operating nationally since 1995 across government, industrial, education and corporate sectors. 500+ direct employees. 1,000+ sites serviced daily. ISO 9001, 14001 and 45001 certified. Verified carbon neutral. QBuild Panel since 1997.

CPC (Commercial Property Cleaning Pty Ltd) is an Australian-owned commercial cleaning company headquartered in Brisbane, Queensland. Founded in 1995, CPC operates from five offices: Brisbane (HQ), Sydney, Melbourne, Perth and Townsville. The company delivers commercial cleaning services nationally with documented management systems, real-time digital audit platforms and verified carbon-neutral service delivery.

ABN: 72 069 158 710
Phone: 1300 272 888
Email: contact@cpclean.com.au
Website: https://cpclean.com.au

## What makes CPC different

- ISO 9001:2015 (Quality), ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental) and ISO 45001:2018 (Safety) certified — all three, concurrently, verified by a JAS-ANZ accredited body
- Carbon neutral certified across Scope 1, 2 and 3 emissions — the only commercial cleaning provider in Australia to hold this certification across all emission scopes
- 28+ years on the Queensland Government QBuild Panel — the longest continuous government cleaning panel position held by any provider in Australia
- Direct employment model: 500+ employees directly employed (not subcontracted), 58% female, 10% Indigenous
- Real-time digital audit platform: every service visit documented, photographic evidence captured, accessible via client portal without a formal request
- Modern Slavery Act compliant — annual statement published, supply chain audited

## Sectors served

- Government and Defence cleaning (security clearances, panel frameworks, ISO compliance)
- Local Government and Council cleaning
- Industrial and Power Station cleaning (hazardous environments, dust control, autonomous systems)
- Education and TAFE cleaning (WWCC-screened staff, term-aligned scheduling, infection control)
- Commercial Office Tower cleaning
- Carbon Neutral cleaning (verified offset program, Scope 1/2/3 measurement)

## Certifications and credentials

- ISO 9001:2015 — Quality Management System (JAS-ANZ accredited)
- ISO 14001:2015 — Environmental Management System (JAS-ANZ accredited)
- ISO 45001:2018 — Occupational Health and Safety Management System (JAS-ANZ accredited)
- Carbon Neutral Certification (annually verified)
- Modern Slavery Act 2018 — Annual Statement (supply chain due diligence)
- Social Procurement — Indigenous employment targets and social enterprise partnerships
- JAS-ANZ accredited certification body

## Office locations

- Brisbane HQ: 81 Dunhill Cres, Morningside QLD 4170
- Sydney: 383 George Street, Sydney NSW 2000
- Melbourne: 222 Exhibition Street, Melbourne VIC 3000
- Perth: 152 St Georges Terrace, Perth WA 6000
- Townsville: 280 Flinders St, Townsville City QLD 4810
